ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Unique FIPS code for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the metro_areas table */,
  "political_leaning" TEXT /* Political leaning of the county (e.g., liberal, conservative, moderate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_metro_id FOREIGN KEY ("metro_id") REFERENCES metro_areas ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week in which the vaccination data was collected */,
  "dose1_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population with at least one dose of vaccine */,
  "fully_vacc_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "booster_dose_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a booster dose */,
  "vaccination_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week in which the weather data was collected */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation in inches */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the weather_stations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density per square mile */,
  "conservative_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying as conservative */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of racial groups (e.g., JSON string) */,
  "educational_attainment" TEXT /* Distribution of educational attainment levels (e.g., JSON string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week in which the case data was collected */,
  "cases_pcap" REAL /* Number of cases per capita */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "case_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_case_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., vaccination rate, case rate) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metro_areas" (
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the metropolitan area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the metropolitan area */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the metropolitan area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the postal code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State associated with the postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postal code area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postal code area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source (e.g., vaccination, weather) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
